title: scabiosa atropurpurea var. minor
intro: Scabiosa atropurpurea var. minor, also known as the smaller or dwarf dark purple scabious, is a flowering plant that belongs to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae) and is native to Europe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Scabiosa atropurpurea var. minor include its ability to promote healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used topically as a poultice or salve, to harness its medicinal properties.
